metadata.name: Generate a National Transit Database (NTD) Report

description: A transit agency must submit its monthly operating data to the federal government's National Transit Database (NTD).

nodes.task_description: Gather all required data for the month, including vehicle revenue miles, vehicle revenue hours, and ridership.

expected_outcome.expected: The system queries multiple sources to get the required data points.

nodes.task_description: Validate the data for any anomalies or errors.

expected_outcome.expected: The data is checked and confirmed to be reasonable.

nodes.task_description: Generate the NTD report in the federally specified format.

expected_outcome.expected: A compliant report file is generated.

nodes.task_description: Submit the report file to the NTD portal.

expected_outcome.expected: The monthly compliance reporting is completed.
